issue_body:
Add a final publish package step that turns the approved episode into creator-editable publishing assets: episode title, short description, chapter markers, speaker credits, and thumbnail options using the selected show identity and episode context. This makes the exported episode feel ready to publish, not just rendered.

## Acceptance (definition of done)
After completing an episode, the user can open a publish package view showing an editable title, description, chapter list, speaker credits, and at least three thumbnail options branded with the show identity. Updating any field is reflected in the final export summary, and `node scripts/run-tests.mjs` passes.

---
This is the current active step for this product. The maintainer will only merge a pull request that completes THIS step and demonstrably works. Open a PR that closes this issue.

_Why this step now: The core creation flow is now present from setup through export and saved show identities. The next highest-value gap is the last-mile publishing layer creators need after a polished long-form video is approved._
